name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> idle]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = critical]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = idle]
          /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, FiniteSet

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

TypeOK == /\ participants \in FiniteSet(N)
          /\ coordinator \in 1..N
          /\ messages \in FiniteSet({[sender: 1..N, receiver: 1..N, type: {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}, payload: BOOLEAN}))

Init == /\ participants = 1..N
        /\ coordinator = 1
        /\ messages = {}

PrepareMsg == [sender: coordinator, receiver: 1..N, type: "Prepare", payload: TRUE]

SendPrepare == /\ messages' = messages \cup {PrepareMsg}
               /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>

VoteYesMsg == [sender: 1..N, receiver: coordinator, type: "VoteYes", payload: TRUE]

VoteNoMsg == [sender: 1..N, receiver: coordinator, type: "VoteNo", payload: FALSE]

SendVoteYes == /\ messages' = messages \cup {VoteYesMsg}
               /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>

SendVoteNo == /\ messages' = messages \cup {VoteNoMsg}
              /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>

CommitMsg == [sender: coordinator, receiver: 1..N, type: "Commit", payload: TRUE]

AbortMsg == [sender: coordinator, receiver: 1..N, type: "Abort", payload: FALSE]

SendCommit == /\ messages' = messages \cup {CommitMsg}
              /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>

SendAbort == /\ messages' = messages \cup {AbortMsg}
             /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>

Next == \/ /\ messages = {}
          /\ SendPrepare
        \/ /\ messages \subseteq {PrepareMsg}
          /\ SendVoteYes
        \/ /\ messages \subseteq {VoteYesMsg}
          /\ SendCommit
        \/ /\ messages \subseteq {VoteNoMsg}
          /\ SendAbort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>> ==

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[f] = p means fork f is held by philosopher p; forks[f] = -1 means fork f is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [f \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [p \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == 
    \/ (* Philosopher p becomes hungry *)
        /\ \E p \in 1..N : states[p] = "thinking"
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"]
    \/ (* Philosopher p picks up forks if both are free *)
        /\ \E p \in 1..N :
            /\ states[p] = "hungry"
            /\ forks[p] = -1
            /\ forks[If p = 1 then N else p-1] = -1
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![p] = p, ![If p = 1 then N else p-1] = p]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"]
    \/ (* Philosopher p puts down forks *)
        /\ \E p \in 1..N :
            /\ states[p] = "eating"
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![p] = -1, ![If p = 1 then N else p-1] = -1]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(Seq(1..N))]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                 /\ q[tail] = 1
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ count' = count + 1
                 /\ head' = head

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                 /\ q[head] = 0
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ count' = count - 1
                 /\ tail' = tail

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
